/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../lib/libPicPlayer.dylib -install_name @rpath/libPicPlayer.dylib CMakeFiles/PicPlayer.dir/src/PicPlayerApi.cpp.o
